metadata.title: Drag To Scroll
metadata.description: Drag to scroll - just like on a touch device.

regex.source: .setDesc("The mouse button used to initiate drag-to-scroll.")
regex.target: .setDesc("用于启动拖拽滚动的鼠标按键。")

regex.source: .setDesc("An optional modifier key that must be held down to enable drag-to-scroll.")
regex.target: .setDesc("必须按住才能启用拖拽滚动的可选修饰键。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Controls the glide effect after release. Left side stops instantly, right side glides for a long time.")
regex.target: .setDesc("控制释放后的滑动效果。左侧立即停止，右侧长距离滑行。")
